top3.sql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(
    CAST(
        ABS(strftime('%Y', final_game) - strftime('%Y', debut)) +
        CAST(ABS(strftime('%m', final_game) - strftime('%m', debut)) AS REAL) / 12 +
        CAST(ABS(strftime('%d', final_game) - strftime('%d', debut)) AS REAL) / 365
    AS REAL)
), 2) AS avg_career_span_years
FROM player
WHERE debut IS NOT NULL AND final_game IS NOT NULL;
